guardrails: W1.5.207 refreshes the A4 evidence inputs with FR-018 high-risk HITL review context evidence, but does not record A4 acceptance.
No accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, packaging, updater, or baseline docx change is included in W1.5.207.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.

Visual-smoke and bridge evidence must remain sanitized and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, persisted params, raw MCP command_or_url or secret_ref values, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, prompt_to_user, or custom_value content.

missing_before_acceptance: A4 reviewer has not recorded first-viewport collapsed stream acceptance.
Phase-level UX recording is still missing.

review_items.review_focus: Expanded stream panel content and event detail readability
missing_before_acceptance: A4 reviewer has not accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user path.

review_items.review_focus: StreamEvent classification labels and unknown-event fallback
required_evidence_fields: unknown cases: fallback label remains visible without raw payload exposure
missing_before_acceptance: A4 reviewer has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence is still missing.

review_items.review_focus: Execution mode control placement and run-once dispatch behavior
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Execution mode controls for step, semi_auto, and auto are visible near run actions.
Step mode dispatch records method, path, run id, node id, status, status code, and blocked reason only.
Semi-auto and auto modes remain fail-closed for run-once when the accepted backend contract does not support them.
A4 capture must show no raw response body, prompt, model output, or arbitrary payload values.
missing_before_acceptance: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.

review_items.review_focus: Runtime-backed Chat instruction routing for current node and global Workflow scopes
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Bottom Chat Box exposes Workflow and Current node scope controls.
Workflow-scope submit routes to the accepted runtime submit-instruction endpoint without nodeId.
Current-node submit routes to the accepted node-scoped submit-instruction endpoint with structured nodeId.
Runtime command projection and renderer snapshots remain metadata-only and do not retain raw instruction text.
No selected/active node disables Current node scope rather than falling back to the first canvas node.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.

review_items.review_focus: Combined project creation and initial reference import user path
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Desktop exposes a reviewer-facing Create + import path that combines project creation and initial reference import.
Project creation success remains gated on git_initialized=true and a non-empty first_commit_sha before the initial reference import runs.
Initial reference import routes through the runtime references endpoint for the created project id.
Renderer evidence does not render or snapshot raw reference bytes, uploaded-file content, task background text, runtime response bodies, secure paths, cache paths, or output directory values.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the full new-project path is not recorded.

review_items.review_focus: Mandatory Git initialization evidence in desktop project creation
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Project creation success is blocked unless git_initialized is true and first_commit_sha is non-empty.
Reviewer evidence includes the desktop create-project path and runtime project endpoint coverage.
A8 git-history audit remains required before FR-012 acceptance.
A4 capture must not expose secure paths, cache paths, raw uploaded content, or credentials.
missing_before_acceptance: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.

review_items.review_focus: Reference import, list, enable, disable, and view user paths
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Reference import/list/enable/disable/view controls are available from the desktop workbench.
Reference state changes are backed by runtime reference endpoints and manifest safety checks.
Delete semantics remain out of A4 scope until accepted spec material defines them.
A4 capture must not retain raw file content, secure paths, cache paths, or uploaded-file bytes.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.

review_items.review_focus: Selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail display and safe native open/download handoff
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Task Drawer exposes selected-node artifact metadata from runtime StreamEvent artifact_refs.
Task Drawer artifact controls dispatch open/download through the accepted ArtifactActionRequest path with run_id and node_id metadata.
Renderer command evidence remains metadata-only and does not include artifact body, raw bytes, full destination path, secure path, cache path, or output directory values.
Desktop native handoff remains covered by W1.5.195 preload/main tests and runtime_actions/http_sse contract anchors.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.

review_items.review_focus: Skill candidate discovery and secret-safe MCP configuration display
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Workbench Skill management reads candidate Skills from the runtime project configuration rather than static renderer state.
Skill enable/disable/version commands remain runtime-backed through the accepted skills endpoint.
MCP configuration metadata is visible as server id, transport, enabled, approval, and secret-ref-present status only.
Renderer snapshots and evidence do not retain persisted params, raw command_or_url values, raw secret_ref values, credentials, secure paths, cache paths, or response bodies.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for secret-safe Skill configuration display is not recorded.

review_items.review_focus: High-risk HITL pause/resume review context and sanitized pending decision controls
required_a4_evidence_inputs: Semi-auto waiting_user runs expose pending high-risk HITL decisions through the accepted run list and decisions projections.
Desktop HITL controls show review kind, evidence/artifact presence, timeout, decision choices, and labels from sanitized runtime metadata.
Runtime and Desktop evidence do not retain prompt_to_user, custom_value content, raw prompt, model output, uploaded-file bytes, response bodies, secure paths, cache paths, or output directory values.
Decision submission continues through the accepted POST /runs/{run_id}/decisions path and records only status/customValuePresent metadata in Desktop snapshots.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for high-risk HITL pause/resume behavior is not recorded.
